message:
test(ensemble): add pure function tests for tokenize, jaccardSimilarity, uniqueStrings

Add 18 table-driven tests for ensemble/auditor.go pure helper functions:
- TestTokenize: 9 cases covering whitespace, duplicates, punctuation
- TestJaccardSimilarity_EdgeCases: 2 cases for empty sets edge conditions
- TestUniqueStrings: 6 cases including empty strings filtering

Part of bd-3bp0r unit test coverage initiative.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
